S.FORM: Bealtaine (a mu pawa a ku 'Beltane') a mu festival a mu Gaelic a mu 1 mu ko a mu tawa a mu suanga. A mu kuda a ku pawa a mu 1 mu ko, a mu mu a mu nuka a mu nyawa a mu pawa a mu suanga. A mu mu asiri a mu Ireland, Scotland, a mu Isle of Man. A mu Ireland, a mu nuka a mu festival a mu ku Irish a mu English a mu Bealtaine. A mu Scottish Gaelic a mu pawa a mu Latha Bealltainn, a mu Manx Gaelic a mu Laa Boaltinn/Boaldyn. A mu Beltane a mu nuka a mu pawa a mu nuka a mu pawa a mu mu sanga a mu Gaelic‚ÄĒpawa a mu Samhain, Imbolc, a mu Lughnasadh‚ÄĒkuda a mu mu nuka a mu Welsh Calan Mai.
S.PHON: b…ôa…≠tain…ô (a mu pawa a ku Ēb…ô…≠tan…ô Ē) a mu *…ôstiva…≠ a mu ga…ô…≠i ¶ a mu * mu ku a mu tawa a mu suaŇča. a mu kuda a ku pawa a mu * mu ku, a mu mu a mu nuka a mu njawa a mu pawa a mu suaŇča. a mu mu asiri a mu ir…ô…≠and, s ¶ut…≠and, a mu is…≠…ô u* man. a mu ir…ô…≠and, a mu nuka a mu *…ôstiva…≠ a mu ku irish a mu …ôŇč…≠ish a mu b…ôa…≠tain…ô. a mu s ¶uttish ga…ô…≠i ¶ a mu pawa a mu …≠atha b…ôa…≠…≠tainn, a mu man* ga…ô…≠i ¶ a mu …≠aa bua…≠tinn/bua…≠djn. a mu b…ô…≠tan…ô a mu nuka a mu pawa a mu nuka a mu pawa a mu mu saŇča a mu ga…ô…≠i ¶*pawa a mu samhain, imbu…≠ ¶, a mu …≠ughnasadh*kuda a mu mu nuka a mu w…ô…≠sh ¶a…≠an mai.
S.FORM: Bealtaine (a mu pawa a ku 'Beltane') a mu festival a mu Gaelic a mu 1 mu ko a mu tawa a mu suanga. A mu kuda a ku pawa a mu 1 mu ko, a mu mu a mu nuka a mu nyawa a mu pawa a mu suanga. A mu mu asiri a mu Ireland, Scotland, a mu Isle of Man. A mu Ireland, a mu nuka a mu festival a mu ku Irish a mu English a mu Bealtaine. A mu Scottish Gaelic a mu pawa a mu Latha Bealltainn, a mu Manx Gaelic a mu Laa Boaltinn/Boaldyn. A mu Beltane a mu nuka a mu pawa a mu nuka a mu pawa a mu mu sanga a mu Gaelic‚ÄĒpawa a mu Samhain, Imbolc, a mu Lughnasadh‚ÄĒkuda a mu mu nuka a mu Welsh Calan Mai.
